description: Canonical schema URI registry for all LuhTech Holdings schemas. Maps schema roles to versioned files. v1.10.0: patent schema family (SBPA) promoted to registry.

changes: follow-up-register schema: v1.0.0 -> v1.1.0 (additive, non-breaking)
Adds FollowUpRecord.relatedDecisions (array<string>, pattern d-YYYY-MM-DD-slug) — formalizes existing pattern in 9 live FUs across FU-AGENT, FU-EB, FU-OPERATOR, FU-FEATURE prefixes

Adds meta.byStatus and meta.byPriority (integer count maps) — regularizes the summary-counts pattern already carried in live register instances; distinct from indexes.byStatus/byPriority which hold full id lists
Source: pipeline-quality arc 2026-05-30 schema-conformance audit; matches FU-FEATURE-DEC-INFRA-GRAPH-ARCHITECTURE cross-repo (Ectropy-Business consumer) per Erik direction 2026-05-30

venture-summary: REMOVED from registry — deprecated derived artifact, no longer canonical (FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-SCHEMA-SYNC-1, FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-DOWNSTREAM-MIGRATION-1). Schema file moves to _archive per deprecation lifecycle.
Consumers (dashboard-sync, dataroom-sync) migrating off venture-summary.json per FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-DOWNSTREAM-MIGRATION-1
roadmap pointer: v3.3.0 -> v3.4.0 (active version; EB instance already authored to v3.4 fields)
roadmap-business pointer: v2.1.0 -> v2.3.0 (active version; EB instance schemaVersion 2.3.0)
Removed roadmap-business.schema.v3.0.draft.json (not deployed; extensions+serviceTiers parked; FU-ROADMAP-BUSINESS-V3-DRAFT-PROMOTION-1 closed won't-do)
marker:PR1-pointer-align-2026-05-29
cis/ namespace: NEW — 3 schemas for B-T operational config files
cis/url-catalog.schema.json (v1.0.0): domain catalog, replaces luh.tech/schemas/url-catalog-v2.json
cis/assessment-sync-config.schema.json (v1.0.0): strategic assessment sync to Notion
cis/cis-infra-changelog.schema.json (v1.0.0): CIS infrastructure change audit ledger
Unblocks B-T FU-CANON-CLASSIFY-URL-CATALOG-LUH-TECH-DOMAIN-1 and FU-CANON-CLASSIFY-SCHEMA-AUTHORING-1
roadmap schema: v3.3 → v3.4 (formalizes `serviceExchanges` and `primaryServiceExchange` on feature objects per DEC-SVX-001)
New canonical enum: `_enums/service-exchange.enum.json` (9 SNx members: GSx, CSx, PSx, HSx, RSx, ASx, ESx, MSx, ISx)
Deprecates `xaasServices` and `xaasServicePrimary` on feature objects — both still accepted in v3.4 with `deprecated: true` markers; removed in v4.0
Source: NAMING-SVCEXCHANGE-2026-05-04.json (Erik 2026-05-04 direction lock)
Note: personaRelevance continues to ride on additionalProperties:true; not formalized in this revision
patent schema family: NEW namespace — 7 schemas under schemas/patent/ promoted from luh-tech/LuhTech-business
Schemas: figure-sidecar, glossary, glossary-entry, manifest, portfolio, prior-art-entry, provisional
All declare $id https://schemas.luh.tech/patent/*.schema.json and $schema draft-07
Closes C1 of B-T patent stabilization cycle
follow-up-register schema: NEW entry — https://schemas.luh.tech/follow-up-register.schema.json (promoted to canonical in PR #5)
decision-log schema: NEW entry — https://schemas.luh.tech/decision-log.schema.v2.json (v2 is portfolio standard; v1 retained for backward-compat only)
Convention note: new entries use URL form for `id` field (matching canonical $id of hosted schema); existing URN-form entries are not retroactively changed
roadmap schema: v3.2 → v3.3 (adds optional `provides: array[string]` and `lifecyclePhases: array[integer 0-7]` on feature objects)
Source: requires/provides matching infrastructure in business-tools (5bd5c4c3) — capabilities.json, challenges.json, lifecycle-phases.json
Note: xaasServices, xaasServicePrimary, personaRelevance continue to ride on additionalProperties:true and are intentionally NOT formalized in this revision; a future schema version may regularize.
roadmap schema: v3.1 → v3.2 (adds required `scope` field on feature objects — product/infrastructure/enterprise-tool/standard enum)
Source: ECTROPY-OPENCORE-STRATEGY-2026-04-16 Decision 1 — Phase A schema introduction for scope classification
roadmap schema: v2.4 → v3.1 (adds mission/vision/currentStage/overallProgress to venture block)
roadmap-business schema: v2.0 → v2.1 (removes mission/vision/currentStage/overallProgress)
venture-summary schema: v1.0 → v2.0 (adds required meta provenance block, DERIVED ARTIFACT warning)
transform-template schema: v1.0 (NEW) — governs transform template file format
Source: Transform Fabric Architecture Strategy v2.0.0 — 2026-02-26

cis-assessment-sync-config.description: Strategic assessment dashboard sync configuration — n8n webhook config and Notion sync targets.

cis-infra-changelog.description: CIS infrastructure changelog — structured audit ledger for CI, terraform, deploy, registry, and droplet changes.

cis-url-catalog.description: LuhTech domain and URL catalog — per-venture Cloudflare account assignments, migration status, URL endpoints. Replaces luh.tech/schemas/url-catalog-v2.json.

decision-log.description: Enhanced ADR with governance, voting, indexes, and implementation tracking. Portfolio-wide standard. v1 (decision-log.schema.json) retained for backward-compat only.

follow-up-register.description: Follow-up item tracking — open work, deferred actions, cross-repo coordination. Adopted portfolio-wide.

patent.description: Patent portfolio infrastructure (SBPA family) — 7 schemas under patent/ namespace. Owned by LuhTech Holdings.

roadmap.description: Technical canonical source — team-visible roadmap data. v3.4 formalizes serviceExchanges + primaryServiceExchange on feature objects (DEC-SVX-001); deprecates xaasServices/xaasServicePrimary (removed v4.0).

roadmap-business.description: Business canonical source — founder/investor-only financial and strategic data. v2.3 ComputedValue across financial domains.

transform-template.description: Governs the format of luhtech-transform template JSON files

title: LuhTech Schema Registry v1.12.0
